message:
Fix critical issues from deep code review

FTS5 duplicate entries on re-index (storage.rs):
- FTS5 virtual tables ignore INSERT OR REPLACE, causing duplicates
- Now explicitly DELETE before INSERT for all FTS tables
- Affects tweets, likes, DMs, and Grok message FTS tables

Grok message ID collision (storage.rs, search.rs):
- Previous ID format (chat_id_timestamp) could collide for same-second msgs
- Now includes nanoseconds and sender for better uniqueness

UTF-8 prefix generation (search.rs):
- Previous code iterated over byte lengths, not character counts
- Could skip prefixes or create invalid slices for multi-byte characters
- Now properly uses character iteration

CSV escaping (main.rs):
- Added carriage return (\r) to the set of characters requiring quoting
- Per RFC 4180, fields with CR/LF must be quoted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
